subject: docs(claude): move Prohibitions before Triggers to match glow-props order
body:
`align` trigger identified section-order drift — glow-props orders AI Notes →
Prohibitions → Triggers, ours had AI Notes → Triggers → Prohibitions. Moved
Prohibitions block (and its reminder) to sit between AI Notes and Triggers.

Tags: documentation, alignment, claude-md, fleet
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
